steps.title: Substitute the input value
steps.content:
To find $f(3)$, replace $x$ with $3$ in the function:
$$f(3)=5(3-3)+7$$

steps.title: Simplify the expression
steps.content:
Evaluate inside the parentheses first, then multiply:
$$5(3-3)+7=5(0)+7=0+7$$

steps.title: State the function value
steps.content: The value of the expression is $7$. The answer is 7.
